item.name: Canal Drum
item.description:
A girthy wavekin named after the drums used by Canal Town street performers of old.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 2 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: In days gone by, the thoroughfares of Canal Town would often be thronged with crowds watching one of the resort's many musical troupes. This rounded wavekin takes its name from the drums used in such performances. Appellation aside, tapping out a triplet or two on its scales is discouraged.
